Products.Name: Mandarin Tangold Seedless
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Mandarin Tangold Seedless' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy Mandarin Tangold Seedless, perfect for lunchboxes or a refreshing snack. With its seedless segments and sweet taste, it's a convenient choice. Shop now!
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Mandarin Tangold Seedless are a delightful citrus fruit, known for their easy-to-peel skin and juicy, segmented flesh. These seedless mandarins offer a wonderfully sweet and tangy flavour, making them a refreshing snack or a versatile ingredient.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Select mandarins that feel firm and heavy, with a bright, even orange colour. Avoid any with soft spots or blemishes.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy fresh as a convenient snack, perfect for lunchboxes. Their sweet segments are also a delicious addition to fruit salads, desserts, or juiced.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store mandarins at room temperature for a few days, away from direct sunlight. For longer freshness, keep them in the refrigerator crisper.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Primarily enjoyed fresh. Zest can be used in baking or dressings, and segments can be added to certain savoury dishes.</section>

Products.Name: Woolworths Royal Gala Apple Punnet
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Woolworths Royal Gala Apple Punnet' has a supply limit of 28. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Woolworths Royal Gala Apple Punnet is your delicious choice for a snack. It's Australian grown with a crisp, sweet flavour. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Royal Gala Apples are a popular choice, known for their crisp and sweet flavour. These Australian-grown apples feature creamy yellow skin adorned with vibrant red stripes, making them a delightful snack or a versatile ingredient in your kitchen.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose apples that are firm to the touch and have smooth, unblemished skin. Look for a good balance of creamy yellow and bright red colours.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy Royal Gala apples fresh as a crunchy snack on their own, or sliced in fruit salads and lunchboxes. They are also a delicious addition to baked goods like crumbles and pies, or can be cooked into sauces.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store your Royal Gala apples in a cool, dry place or in the refrigerator to maintain their crispness. For optimal freshness when refrigerating, remove them from the outer packaging.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, stew, sauté.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> These crisp Royal Gala Apples are 100% Australian grown, sourced from local farms across the country.</section>

Products.Name: Woolworths Capsicum Green
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Woolworths Capsicum Green' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Capsicum Green. A fresh product with crisp texture and vibrant colour, it's ideal for your favourite dishes. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Green Capsicums offer a crisp texture and a distinctive fresh flavour. These versatile vegetables are a popular choice for both raw and cooked dishes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Select firm capsicums with smooth, vibrant green skins and no blemishes. They should feel heavy for their size.

</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy raw in salads, sandwiches, or as dippers. Excellent in stir-fries, curries, fajitas, and roasted dishes.

</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store green capsicums in the crisper drawer of your refrigerator. They remain fresh for up to one week.

</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, barbecue, grill, roast, sauté, stir-fry.

</section>

Products.Name: Woolworths White Flat Mushrooms Punnet
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Woolworths White Flat Mushrooms Punnet' has a supply limit of 8. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Woolworths White Flat Mushrooms is your versatile choice for your next BBQ. Grown in Australia, it's simple to prepare. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths White Flat Mushrooms are proudly Australian grown, offering a hearty, earthy flavour. Perfect for grilling and cooking, they add rich taste and satisfying texture.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm, smooth mushrooms with an even colour. Avoid soft spots, shrivelled edges, or excess moisture.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store in their punnet or a paper bag in the refrigerator. This keeps them fresh. Avoid airtight containers, which cause spoilage.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Ideal for barbecuing, sautéing, roasting, or stuffing. Enjoy as a flavourful side, in burgers, or a meat-free option.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, barbecue, grill, roast, sauté, stir-fry.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> These flat mushrooms are proudly Australian grown by our partners, Costa Mushrooms. They are available year-round, harvested fresh.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Afourer Mandarins are a delightful citrus fruit, known for their vibrant orange colour and easy-to-peel skin. These sweet and juicy mandarins are a perfect snack for any time of day, offering a refreshing burst of flavour.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose mandarins that feel heavy for their size, indicating juiciness. Look for bright, unblemished skin that is firm to the touch. Avoid any with soft spots or discolouration.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Iceberg Shredded Lettuce offers crisp, refreshing leaves, pre-shredded for great convenience. Washed and ready to use, it's an ideal choice for quick meals. A 75g serving contributes to your daily vegetable intake, as recommended by Australian Dietary Guidelines.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Look for a package with crisp, vibrant green shredded lettuce. Avoid any signs of wilting or discolouration.

</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy as a fresh base for salads, or as a crisp topping for burgers, tacos, and sandwiches. It makes a versatile side dish and is perfect for adding a refreshing element to wraps.

</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store in the refrigerator to maintain crispness. Keep the packet sealed until ready to use.

</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Best enjoyed fresh and raw; no cooking required.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Onion Shallot French is your versatile choice for enhancing dishes. Its mild, delicate flavour is easy to use. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>French Shallots are small, elongated members of the onion family, prized for their delicate flavour. They offer a milder, sweeter taste with a subtle hint of garlic compared to common onions. These versatile aromatics are perfect for enhancing a wide range of dishes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose French Shallots that are firm, dry, and free from soft spots or sprouts. Look for smooth, intact outer skins.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy French Shallots finely minced in vinaigrettes and dressings for a delicate flavour. They are delicious sautéed as an aromatic base for sauces, soups, and stews, or roasted whole with other vegetables. They also make an excellent pickled accompaniment.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store French Shallots in a cool, dry, and dark place with good air circulation. Avoid refrigerating, as this can reduce their shelf life. They will typically keep for several weeks when stored correctly.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Sauté, roast, caramelise, pickle, deep-fry, raw.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Leek Fresh each is a versatile, mild-flavoured member of the onion family, resembling a larger spring onion. These vegetables offer a delicate sweetness with subtle hints of garlic and chives. They are a wonderful addition to many cooked dishes, enhancing flavour without overpowering.</section>

<section><header>How to Prepare:</header> Thoroughly wash leeks before use, as they can trap grit within their layers. Trim the ends and halve lengthwise for braising, or chop and slice according to your recipe.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Leeks are delicious braised in butter and broth until tender, offering a rich, sweet flavour. They can be simmered in soups, sautéed for potato gratins or quiches, or used as a base for creamy risotto. Thinly slice and fry them for a crunchy garnish on soups or crostini.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Braise, simmer, fry, sauté.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Fresh Pink Lady Apples deliver a sweet and tangy flavour with a crisp, juicy bite. These vibrant apples are a popular snack, with one apple counting as one serve of fruit. They are also versatile for many culinary uses.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Select firm apples that feel heavy for their size, with smooth skin and an even red blush. Avoid any soft spots or bruising.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy fresh as a crunchy snack, sliced in salads, or added to lunchboxes. They are great baked into pies, crumbles, or simmered in savoury dishes.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store Pink Lady Apples in your refrigerator's crisper drawer. This helps maintain their crispness and flavour for several weeks.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, stew, roast, sauté.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> Grown with care by Australian farmers.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Potato Brushed each is a versatile choice for your cooking. It's brushed, making it simple to prepare. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Brushed Potatoes are a versatile kitchen staple, offering an earthy flavour and firm texture. They are perfect for many culinary creations, from hearty roasts to creamy mashes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm potatoes with smooth, unblemished skins. Avoid green spots, sprouts, or soft areas.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store potatoes in a cool, dark, well-ventilated place for several weeks. Avoid refrigeration, as it can affect texture and flavour.
</section>

<section><header>How to Prepare:</header> Wash thoroughly, gently scrubbing off soil. Peel if desired, or leave skin on for rustic appeal. Cut to your preferred shape.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy brushed potatoes mashed, roasted, baked, or in hearty stews and soups. They pair well with herbs like rosemary and thyme. Complement meats, vegetables, or make delicious potato salads and chips.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, boil, roast, steam, fry, mash, grill.
</section>

AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths White Washed Baby Potatoes are small, convenient, and ready for your next meal. These versatile baby potatoes offer a mild, earthy flavour and are a source of Vitamin C. Enjoy them in a variety of dishes, knowing that just one baby potato (75g) contributes to one serve of vegetables.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm, unblemished potatoes with smooth skin. Avoid any with green spots, sprouts, or soft areas.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store potatoes in a cool, dark, and well-ventilated place. Avoid refrigeration, as this can affect their texture and flavour.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Baby potatoes are delicious roasted whole, boiled and buttered, or added to stews and curries. They make a wonderful side dish for meats, fish, and vegetarian meals. Try them in salads or smashed and baked until crispy.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, boil, roast, steam, microwave, grill, fry.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> These baby potatoes are proudly homegrown in Australia.</section>

Storing your apples in the fridge will keep them crisp and fresh for longer.

Health Benefits:
No matter the variety, apples contain fibre, that aids in healthy digestion, and vitamin C, to support the immune system*

*Based on one medium apple (150g), as part of a healthy balanced diet
